summary: Admin Features Management Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (feature toggles + API config). Frontend: All UI flows verified - admin can toggle features, configure APIs, regular users cannot access admin endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Feature toggles correctly affect Profile page rendering
API config sections have proper input validation
Non-admin users correctly blocked with 403 from all admin endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded data. Feature toggles collection auto-created with defaults on first access.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Features feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/admin/features/public - works without auth, returns {feature_name: boolean} map. 2) GET /api/admin/features - admin only, returns full toggle config with label, category, enabled. 3) PUT /api/admin/features - admin can toggle features {feature_name: boolean}. 4) GET /api/admin/features/api-config - returns telefonia and fintech configs. 5) PUT /api/admin/features/api-config/{section} - admin updates provider, api_key, api_secret, endpoint, enabled, notes. 6) Non-admin gets 403 on all admin endpoints. 7) Admin Features page (/admin/features) shows 3 categories (Generale, Fintech, Telefonia) with 10 toggles. 8) API config sections have Provider, API Key, API Secret (with show/hide), Endpoint, Notes, and Save button. 9) Toggle click updates backend and shows toast. 10) Profile page correctly hides sections when features disabled (tested invita_amici). 11) Conto UP activation shows '15,99 UP' not EUR. 12) Dashboard shows 'Admin - Funzionalità & API' button only for admin users.

verified_features.GET /api/admin/features/public: PASS - No auth required, returns feature states
verified_features.GET /api/admin/features: PASS - Admin gets full toggle config
verified_features.PUT /api/admin/features/api-config/telef: PASS - Admin can update telefonia config
verified_features.PUT /api/admin/features/api-config/finte: PASS - Admin can update fintech config
verified_features.Admin Features page toggles: PASS - All 10 toggles present with switches
verified_features.API Telefonia config section: PASS - All fields present (provider, key, secret, endpoint, notes)
verified_features.Toggle interaction: PASS - Click updates backend, shows toast
verified_features.Profile conditional rendering: PASS - Sections hidden when features disabled
verified_features.Dashboard admin button: PASS - Visible only for admin users
